Account Compromise & Recovery Services | Digital Forensics .company <

Regain Control. Assess Damage. Prevent Recurrence.

Account takeover attacks are increasingly sophisticated, leveraging credential stuffing, SIM swapping, phishing, and social engineering to bypass even multi-factor authentication. Our recovery process is systematic, thorough, and designed to leave you more secure than before the incident.

Recovery Services

  • Emergency account lockdown and recovery assistance
  • SIM swap detection and carrier coordination
  • Email account compromise assessment and remediation
  • Social media account recovery
  • Financial account monitoring and fraud coordination
  • Password and credential reset across all affected services
  • Multi-factor authentication deployment and hardening
  • Identity theft remediation guidance

Post-Recovery Hardening

Recovery is only the first step. We implement comprehensive security hardening including hardware security keys, privacy-focused email migration, password manager deployment, and ongoing monitoring to prevent future compromises.

>

Home?Services? Account Recovery
Personal Services
& Recovery>Account Compromise
& Recovery& Recovery>

HERORapid response for hacked accounts, identity theft, SIM swaps, and unauthorized access. Professional account recovery and security hardening for individuals and executives.

Regain Control. Assess Damage. Prevent Recurrence.

Account takeover attacks are increasingly sophisticated, leveraging credential stuffing, SIM swapping, phishing, and social engineering to bypass even multi-factor authentication. Our recovery process is systematic, thorough, and designed to leave you more secure than before the incident.

Recovery Services

  • Emergency account lockdown and recovery assistance
  • SIM swap detection and carrier coordination
  • Email account compromise assessment and remediation
  • Social media account recovery
  • Financial account monitoring and fraud coordination
  • Password and credential reset across all affected services
  • Multi-factor authentication deployment and hardening
  • Identity theft remediation guidance

Post-Recovery Hardening

Recovery is only the first step. We implement comprehensive security hardening including hardware security keys, privacy-focused email migration, password manager deployment, and ongoing monitoring to prevent future compromises.

Account Types

  • Email & Cloud
  • Banking & Financial
  • Social Media
  • Business Systems
  • Identity Theft
  • SIM Swap

Emergency Help

Contact us immediately if your accounts have been compromised.

Get Help Now

Regain Control. Assess Damage. Prevent Recurrence.

Account takeover attacks are increasingly sophisticated, leveraging credential stuffing, SIM swapping, phishing, and social engineering to bypass even multi-factor authentication. Our recovery process is systematic, thorough, and designed to leave you more secure than before the incident.

Recovery Services

  • Emergency account lockdown and recovery assistance
  • SIM swap detection and carrier coordination
  • Email account compromise assessment and remediation
  • Social media account recovery
  • Financial account monitoring and fraud coordination
  • Password and credential reset across all affected services
  • Multi-factor authentication deployment and hardening
  • Identity theft remediation guidance

Post-Recovery Hardening

Recovery is only the first step. We implement comprehensive security hardening including hardware security keys, privacy-focused email migration, password manager deployment, and ongoing monitoring to prevent future compromises.
